headline: Assessing First Solar (FSLR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Mixed Market Signals
summary: First Solar (FSLR) has drawn fresh attention after a recent share price pullback, with the stock showing a 10% decline over the past month and a 26.6% decline over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for First Solar. Zooming out, the recent 9.9% 30 day share price decline and 26.6% 90 day share price decline contrast with a 47.2% 1 year total shareholder return, which suggests fading short term momentum alongside a much stronger longer term payoff for holders.
